commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Neuralwatt as an API-key usage provider across provider registration, settings/config and token-account resolution, quota fetching, menu/widget exhaustiveness, tests, and docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: current main has no Neuralwatt provider, and this PR adds a new provider surface. The source and tests show the intended parser path, but live proof for the hardened exact head is not currently inspectable.
